name: sshine-create-rust-project
description: Interactively scaffold new Rust projects with opinionated defaults: workspace or single-crate, Nix integration, error handling, CI, and more

plugins.name: new-rust-project
plugins.description: Scaffold a new Rust project. Use when the user wants to create a new Rust project, crate, or workspace. Asks about project type, Nix integration, error handling, dependencies, CI, and license, then generates all files.
